wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Trash Heap.png}} {{E|Trash Heap|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Underdocks}}. It is unlocked after accumulating enough score to unlock the "Cultists" timeline event. == Options == {{Frame|Dive In}} {{TS|negative||Lose 8 HP.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain a random {{2|Relics|Relic}}.}} * Relic pool: {{R|Darkstone Periapt||2}}, {{R|Dream Catcher||2}}, {{R|Hand Drill||2}}, {{R|Maw Bank||2}}, {{R|The Boot||2}}.
{{Frame|Grab Random Junk}} {{TS|positive||Gain 100 Gold.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain a random card.}} * Card pool: {{C|Caltrops||2}}, {{C|Distraction||2}}, {{C|Outmaneuver||2}}, {{C|Clash||2}}, {{C|Dual Wield||2}}, {{C|Entrench||2}}, {{C|Hello World||2}}, {{C|Rebound||2}}, {{C|Stack||2}}, {{C|Rip and Tear||2}}. == Conditions == * Only appears if you have more than 5 HP. == Dialogue ==
You discover a towering pile of scrapped weapons, discarded trinkets, and other oddities. The massive pile shifts and rumbles, as if growing from within... If you scavenge from the surface, you may find some decent things. But if you really get in there, you may find some exotic treasures.
{{Frame|Dive In}}
You spend a decent amount of time wading through the dangerous garbage and find a relic of the past! Why was this thrown out?
{{Frame|Grab Random Junk}}
You walk around the pile from a safe distance and pick up some forgotten valuables and oddities here and there. Why were these created in the first place?
==Unlocking== {{E|Trash Heap|2}} is unlocked in the {{2|Timeline#Cultists|Cultists}} Epoch. ==Trivia== * All possible Relics and Cards are awarded with equal probability. * All rewards are relics/cards present in Slay The Spire 1. * While most of the card art is identical to the original version, Caltrops and Rip and Tear feature updated art. [[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
